MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Loretta M. Norris, Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Michael S. Rossoff, Esq. amd Deborah Henderson, Esq. represented Defendant, Geoffrey Suggs. The case settled per written stipulation of parties, read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
